ddls:
CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "department" INTEGER /* Department to which the researcher belongs */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "highest_degree" TEXT /* Highest academic degree of the researcher */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* List of research interests */,
  "number_of_publications" INTEGER /* Total number of publications by the researcher */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Total number of citations received by the researcher */,
  "h_index" INTEGER /* H-index to measure the researcher's impact */,
  "last_publication_year" INTEGER /* Year of the last publication */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the researcher's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_researchers_department FOREIGN KEY ("department") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the publication was published */,
  "journal_name" TEXT /* Name of the journal where the publication was published */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the publication */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Total number of citations received by the publication */,
  "impact_factor" REAL /* Impact factor of the journal */,
  "number_of_pages" INTEGER /* Number of pages in the publication */,
  "publication_type" TEXT /* Type of publication (e.g., article, conference paper, book chapter) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "co_authorships" (
  "co_authorship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each co-authorship record */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who is a co-author */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication where the co-authorship occurred */,
  "co_author_score" REAL /* Score indicating the quality of the co-authorship */,
  "co_author_name" TEXT /* Name of the co-author */,
  "co_author_department" TEXT /* Department of the co-author */,
  "co_authorship_year" INTEGER /* Year of the co-authorship */,
  "co_authorship_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the co-authorship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("co_authorship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_co_authorships_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_co_authorships_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "head_of_department" TEXT /* Name of the head of the department */,
  "department_website" TEXT /* URL to the department's website */,
  "department_email" TEXT /* Email address for the department */,
  "department_phone" TEXT /* Phone number for the department */,
  "department_location" TEXT /* Location of the department within the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric record */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher for whom the metrics are calculated */,
  "most_recent_co_publication" INTEGER /* Most recent year in which the researcher had a co-publication */,
  "number_of_co_publications" INTEGER /* Total number of co-publications by the researcher */,
  "rationale" TEXT /* Explanation of the co-author score and its rationale */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Total number of citations received by the researcher's publications */,
  "h_index" INTEGER /* H-index to measure the researcher's impact */,
  "co_authorship_frequency" REAL /* Frequency of co-authorship (e.g., average number of co-publications per year) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_metrics_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing user permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
